description_long: This house features a complex, multi-hipped roof with dark shingles and a predominantly white exterior. Large rectangular windows are present on the sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious covered patio with outdoor seating and planters, partially shaded by a pergola structure. The front entryway is defined by a modern door with glass panels, flanked by low landscaping elements. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor living space. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a strong emphasis on geometric lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark hipped roof, large windows, and a covered patio area. The design emphasizes clean lines, outdoor living, and a bright white facade.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two large rectangular windows and the dark, multi-hipped roof dominating the top.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entryway with a modern glass-paneled door, flanked by landscaping and a glimpse of the covered patio area.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the spacious covered patio with outdoor seating, planters, and a pergola, as well as a large window on the house's side.
description_view_3: This view displays the back and side of the house, focusing on the roof structure and a mostly solid wall with minimal openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Modern glass-paneled door with minimal steps, flanked by low landscaping and a clean, unornamented facade
